calendar.matters:
PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Dale for Virginia Spears. Larry Strick, counsel for Virginia Spears in the malpractice case.

The Court asked counsel to clarify the bond amount. Mr. Dale stated that there was confusion on the amount and that $145,470.90 is the correct amount. The Court asked how much there was to pay into the Special Needs Trust. Mr. Dale stated that the amount is $145,470.90, that they will not be going with Senior Medi-Benefits because it is a pooled trust and not compliant, that Herb Thomas will be the trustee, that the client is terminally ill and that they are looking to change venue to Alameda County. The petition re substituted judgment trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)
